title: MORE ITEMS,MOBS,DIMENSIONS
description: STOP SCROOLING! AND CHECK IT!  it adds More Weapons,dimensions,biomes,foods,armors,blocks,mobs,structures....
body:
TRAILER V0.6:
https://youtu.be/MPRNDXF8Ipw
____________________________________
DONT FORGET ABOUT BETA RELASE BEFORE RATING!!!!
FOR CONTENT CREATORS:
YOU MUST GIVE LINK TO THIS MOD BY MODRINTH OR CURSEFORGE

JOIN TO DC FOR CHANELOG WHATS WILL BE ADDED!

LATEST VERSIONS,INFO
https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-mod-by-niepokonany
 
INFO:
MORE! Is A Mod Made With Heart.
It Has Planed To have OVER 5k ITEMS
Its made by 1 developer{me}
ok but whats Mod MORE! Adds?
NOTE: SOME OF ARENT MADE FOR NOW!!!
Weapons,Armors,Foods,Mobs,Blocks,Dimensions,Biomes,Features,Recipes,,Commands,Boses,gui,LUCKY BLOCKS.Structures and MORE
---------------------------------------------------
NOT ALL INCLUNDENT

Info For V.0.6 RELEASE

ITEMS EFFECTS NOT INCLUDENT!!!!!

[expect armors from foods]
GUIS:
Settings[in work]
Item giver:
NOTE:You need be in creative mode to get it
OPArmor
64 Bedrock
debug stick
64 barrier
64 command_blocks
Modules
New BIG GUI!
NOTE:FOR SOME MODULES YOU NEED OP PERMISIONS LEVEL 4[IN SERVER DO OP OR INCREASE MAX OP PERMISION LEVEL}
WHY?
BECAUSE MODRINTH DOESNT ALLOWS HACK CLIENTS AND THIS MOD IS TOO FOR SERVERS SOO...

Fastgm0
fastgm1

feed

NofallOn
NoFallOff
Regen 1
